notes: Deep music scan + dramatic floor. Analyzer adds bass_hits (sub-30Hz onsets), tempo_curve (local BPM every 4s), and micro_silences (50-400ms RMS dips before drops). Floor amplitude doubled — base 18→36 px, peak 95 px, scrolls faster on louder sections, 11 rows. Walls swap every 4 downbeats (was 8) so geometry visibly shifts every ~7s. Bass hits punch a centered shockwave + shake. Micro silences dim the arena for the inhale. Pulse decay tightened (kick 5.5→12, hat 11→14, snare 3→4.5) so high-BPM tracks don't smear. All 16 tracks re-analyzed.
